nodes.name: Mapo Tofu with Steamed Rice
nodes.description: name: Mapo Tofu with Steamed Rice | short_description: A classic Sichuan dish of silken tofu braised in a spicy, numbing sauce with ground pork, doubanjiang, and Sichuan peppercorns — bold and comfort
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Mapo Tofu with Steamed Rice - name: Mapo Tofu with Steamed Rice | short_description: A classic Sichuan dish of silken tofu braised in a spicy, numbing sauce with ground pork, doubanjiang, and Sichuan peppercorns — bold and comforting. | meal_suggestion: Brown ground pork, then stir in doubanjiang (fermented chili bean paste), minced garlic, and ginger. Add silken tofu cubes and simmer gently. Finish with Sichuan peppercorn powder and sliced scallions. Serve over steamed rice. Reduce chili paste for a milder version. | nutrition_note: Tofu provides plant-based protein, calcium, and isoflavones; pork adds complete protein and iron. Sichuan peppercorns have anti-inflammatory properties. Doubanjiang is high in sodium — use sparingly. A satisfying, protein-rich dish; pair with steamed greens for extra fiber.

nodes.name: Vietnamese Pho Bo (Beef Pho)
nodes.description: name: Vietnamese Pho Bo (Beef Pho) | short_description: Aromatic Vietnamese beef noodle soup with a rich star anise and cinnamon-spiced broth, tender beef slices, and fresh rice noodles topped with he
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Vietnamese Pho Bo (Beef Pho) - name: Vietnamese Pho Bo (Beef Pho) | short_description: Aromatic Vietnamese beef noodle soup with a rich star anise and cinnamon-spiced broth, tender beef slices, and fresh rice noodles topped with herbs. | meal_suggestion: Simmer beef bones with star anise, cinnamon, cloves, and ginger for a fragrant broth. Serve over cooked rice noodles with thinly sliced beef (the hot broth cooks the raw slices). Garnish with bean sprouts, Thai basil, lime wedges, and sliced jalapeño. Add hoisin and sriracha to taste. | nutrition_note: Beef provides high-quality protein, iron, and zinc; rice noodles are gluten-free and easy to digest; bone broth may contain collagen and minerals. Fresh herbs and lime add vitamin C and antioxidants. Broth can be high in sodium — skim fat and use reduced-sodium broth if needed.

nodes.name: Miso-Glazed Black Cod with Bok Choy
nodes.description: name: Miso-Glazed Black Cod with Bok Choy | short_description: Buttery black cod marinated in sweet white miso glaze, broiled until caramelized, and served with garlic-sautéed bok choy and steamed ric
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Miso-Glazed Black Cod with Bok Choy - name: Miso-Glazed Black Cod with Bok Choy | short_description: Buttery black cod marinated in sweet white miso glaze, broiled until caramelized, and served with garlic-sautéed bok choy and steamed rice. | meal_suggestion: Marinate black cod in a mixture of white miso, mirin, sake, and a touch of sugar for at least 2 hours (overnight is best). Broil until the glaze caramelizes. Sauté bok choy with garlic and a splash of soy sauce. Serve with steamed rice and garnish with sesame seeds. | nutrition_note: Black cod is exceptionally rich in omega-3 fatty acids and provides high-quality protein; bok choy offers calcium, vitamin C, and vitamin K. Miso is fermented and supports gut health but adds sodium. A nutrient-dense, elegant dinner; balance with vegetables and moderate rice portions.
